title: Node Process, Event Loop, Modules, Configuration, and Lifecycle · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but broken process, event-loop, configuration, and lifecycle state model; preserve the failing exchange, locate the first causal Node or Express boundary, and retain a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in process, event-loop, configuration, and lifecycle state model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Trace call stack, timers, pending callbacks, poll, check, close callbacks, microtasks, and next-tick work without assuming one request owns one event-loop turn.
Configure ESM, CommonJS interop, package exports, file extensions, and NodeNext resolution without relying on accidental development-loader behavior.
Parse, validate, normalize, redact, and freeze configuration once before acquiring resources or accepting traffic.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Event Loop Work Queues
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 8911 in a document service receiving slow compressed uploads. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate configuration, readiness, admission, and signal-driven draining; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace call stack, timers, pending callbacks, poll, check, close callbacks, microtasks, and next-tick work without assuming one request owns one event-loop turn.

Inspect the Event Loop Work Queues trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Event Loop Work Queues.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace call stack, timers, pending callbacks, poll, check, close callbacks, microtasks, and next-tick work without assuming one request owns one event-loop turn. For Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Event Loop Work Queues, keep Event Loop Work Queues connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
